item.title: F-034: Spell Check
item.intent: Spell check is table stakes for any writing tool — it must work out of the box using the system spell checker
item.description: Uses UITextChecker (iOS) / NSSpellChecker (macOS). Red underline on misspelled words. Tap/right-click for correction suggestions. Respects system language and custom dictionary. Coexists with document doctor indicators without visual conflict. Works in both rich text and source view. On by default, toggleable.
acceptanceCriteria: User types a misspelled word — red underline appears
Tapping the underlined word shows correction suggestions
Spell check works in both rich text and source view
Spell check and doctor indicators do not visually conflict
Spell check does NOT flag words inside code blocks, code spans, or URLs
Spell check works for the users system language, not just English
Custom dictionary additions persist across app launches
